channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: 4 browser-boosting ChatGPT Chrome extensions
item.description: Plenty of people who use ChatGPT get stuff done by hopping between OpenAI’s chatbot and broader web-browsing sessions. But extensions that fuse ChatGPT right into Chrome have resulted in a peanut-butter-and-chocolate moment for AI and web browsing.
item.dc:creator: Doug Aamoth, Fast Company

item.title: OpenAI expands multi-modal capabilities with updated text-to-video model
item.description: OpenAI has released a new version of its text-to-video AI model, Sora, for ChatGPT Plus and Pro users, marking another step in expansion into multimodal AI technologies.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Nvidia's stock dips after China opens probe of the AI chip company for violating anti-monopoly laws
item.description: Shares of Nvidia fell Monday after China said it is investigating the high-flying U.S. microchip company over suspected violations of Chinese anti-monopoly laws.
item.dc:creator: MATT OTT, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: How TikTok’s U.S. content creators are bracing for a possible ban in 6 weeks
item.description: American content creators on TikTok asked followers to subscribe to their channels on rival platforms like Meta-owned Instagram and Alphabet’s YouTube after a federal appeals court ruled that the social media app could be banned if it is not sold to a U.S.-based company by Jan. 19.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Python a shoo-in for Tiobe language of the year
item.description: High-flying Python is expected to win the Tiobe programming language of the year designation for 2024, as the language with the biggest ratings increase in Tiobe’s language popularity index during the year. Python also ranks as the most popular programming language in the index overall.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: California to consider requiring mental health warnings on social media sites
item.description: SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — California, home to some of the largest technology companies in the world, would be the first U.S. state to require mental health warning labels on social media sites if lawmakers pass a bill introduced Monday.
item.dc:creator: TRÂN NGUYỄN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Rescuers rush to save geese and ducks soaked in oil due to spill in Boston river
item.description: Wildlife rescuers are rushing to tend to dozens of geese and ducks that were soaked in oil after a spill in a Boston river.
item.dc:creator: Charles Krupa And Patrick Whittle, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Helen Toner’s OpenAI exit only made her a more powerful force for responsible AI
item.description: On November 17, 2023, Helen Toner went from being a little-known member of OpenAI’s board of directors to one of the biggest influencers in the debate over responsible AI.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: Philippine volcano eruption sends villagers fleeing for safety as homes are blanketed in ash
item.description: A large volcano eruption in the Philippines sent a plume of ash and gases up to 1.8 miles high following a powerful blast that sent villagers fleeing to emergency shelters.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Data center certifications target newcomers, experts, and sustainability pros
item.description: As data centers evolve from traditional compute and storage facilities into AI powerhouses, the demand for qualified professionals continues to grow exponentially and salaries are high.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The cognitive cost of AI
item.description: I exist at the intersection of two worlds, management and artificial intelligence (AI), which are evolving at different paces. I’ve witnessed firsthand how generative AI tools can democratize access to knowledge, accelerate learning, and spark creativity in ways we never imagined possible.
item.dc:creator: Tara Chklovski, Fast Company

item.title: South Bay state senator proposes to bar resale of diesel-powered trains
item.description: The bill would prevent the resale of decommissioned diesel-powered trains from California for continued use in another country.
item.dc:creator: Nollyanne Delacruz, The Mercury News

item.title: District of Columbia says Amazon secretly stopped fast deliveries to 2 predominantly Black ZIP codes
item.description: The District of Columbia sued Amazon on Wednesday, alleging the company secretly stopped providing its fastest delivery service to residents of two predominantly Black neighborhoods while still charging millions of dollars for a membership that promises the benefit.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: OpenAI's Sam Altman 'not that worried' about rival Elon Musk's influence in the Trump administration
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, who is in a legal dispute with rival Elon Musk, said he is “not that worried” about Musk's influence in the incoming Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Fortinet launches integrated cloud app security service
item.description: Fortinet has melded some of its previously available services into an integrated cloud package aimed at helping customers secure applications.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How to bulk delete spam and old text messages on iPhone
item.description: Tech wizard Kurt "CyberGuy" Knutsson explains how to delete old unwanted texts and spam messages from cluttered inboxes of an iPhone in bulk.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Murder trial of tech consultant in stabbing death of Cash App founder Bob Lee to go to jurors
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Closing arguments in the high-profile murder trial of a tech consultant charged in the stabbing death of Cash App founder Bob Lee concluded Tuesday, with both sides urging jurors to use their common sense to deliver justice.
item.dc:creator: JANIE HAR, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Founder of failed crypto lending platform Celsius Network pleads guilty to fraud charges
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The founder and former CEO of the failed cryptocurrency lending platform Celsius Network could face decades in prison after pleading guilty Tuesday to federal fraud charges, admitting that he misled customers about the business.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Agencies still struggling to meet digital accessibility standards
item.description: GSA has said that limited staffing and resources are key drivers of agencies’ ongoing challenges with digital accessibility and Section 508 conformance. The post Agencies still struggling to meet digital accessibility standards first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Drew Friedman, Federal News Network

item.title: Securing the AI data pipeline with confidential AI
item.description: There is a need to create secure computing capabilities that maintain the privacy and confidentiality of AI models and data sets. The post Securing the AI data pipeline with confidential AI first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: Elon Musk's Neuralink expands offices in Austin area
item.description: Musk's brain-computer interface company, Neuralink, will expand in the area with more space and job openings.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Al-Shaikh, NewsNation

item.title: Ocasio-Cortez first person to hit a million followers on Bluesky
item.description: Other than Bluesky’s own account, Ocasio-Cortez’s follower landmark is a first for a user, the platform told The Hill.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, NewsNation

item.title: What to make of Pat Gelsinger’s abrupt exit
item.description: The retirement of Intel CEO Pat Gelsinger has left more questions than Intel answered in its statement regarding his departure. Intel in the past had a measured process of ascension for future CEOs.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: TikTok defends handling of Romania election content in grilling by EU lawmakers
item.description: BUCHAREST, Romania (AP) — TikTok took down several networks that tried to meddle in Romania's elections, executives said Tuesday as they defended the company's election integrity measures to European Union lawmakers.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN and STEPHEN McGRATH, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: AT&T sees earnings growth over next 3 years; eyes more than $40B in anticipated shareholder returns
item.description: AT&T anticipates earnings growth over the next three years thanks to the momentum of 5G and fiber services.
item.dc:creator: MICHELLE CHAPMAN, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: China bans exports to US of gallium, germanium, antimony in response to chip sanctions
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — China announced Tuesday it is banning exports to the United States of gallium, germanium, antimony and other key high-tech materials with potential military applications, as a general principle, lashing back at U.S. limits on semiconductor-related exports.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, Fox 5
